name: applicant_legal_name_present
expression: applicant_legal_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(applicant_legal_name)) > 0
description: A commercial loan application is not actionable without borrower legal identity.

name: requested_loan_amount_positive
expression: requested_loan_amount IS NOT NULL AND requested_loan_amount > 0
description: Requested loan amount is required and must be positive.

name: application_date_valid
expression: application_date IS NULL OR application_date <= CURRENT_DATE()
description: Future application dates usually indicate extraction or data-entry errors.

name: entity_type_present
expression: applicant_entity_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(applicant_entity_type)) > 0
description: Entity type is important for KYB, authority, and beneficial ownership review.

name: guarantors_array_valid
description: Guarantors should be represented as an array when present.
